raw: {"perspective": "Ecosystem Auditor", "findings": [{"severity": "CRITICAL", "file_or_area": "code-index", "issue": "code-index stale (last update 2026-04-29, >7 days old) — agents are simulating against outdated reality", "recommended_fix": "regenerate code-index immediately and block swarm execution until fresh"}, {"severity": "CRITICAL", "file_or_area": "ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION", "issue": "Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) missing from all products except MindShift — violates Foundation Law 2 across VOLAURA, Life Simulator, BrandedBy, Atlas", "recommended_fix": "audit all product UIs for Energy Adaptation compliance; implement missing dark mode, time-based themes, motion toggles"}, {"severity": "HIGH", "file_or_area": "swarm/autonomous_run.py", "issue": "perspective_weights all zero — swarm learning inactive, no memory persistence, 13/13 perspectives dormant", "recommended_fix": "activate learning loop and weight updates; validate spawn counts are non-zero"}, {"severity": "MEDIUM", "file_or_area": "Crystal Economy", "issue": "leaderboards present in Life Simulator — violates Crystal Law 5 (Collaborative > Zero-Sum) and P0 in ecosystem-map.md", "recommended_fix": "remove all user rankings, replace with shared Focus Rooms or collective milestones"}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "swarm operating in simulation without updated code-index — production risk imminent"}

findings.issue: code-index stale (last update 2026-04-29, >7 days old) — agents are simulating against outdated reality
findings.recommended_fix: regenerate code-index immediately and block swarm execution until fresh

findings.issue: Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) missing from all products except MindShift — violates Foundation Law 2 across VOLAURA, Life Simulator, BrandedBy, Atlas
findings.recommended_fix: audit all product UIs for Energy Adaptation compliance; implement missing dark mode, time-based themes, motion toggles

findings.issue: perspective_weights all zero — swarm learning inactive, no memory persistence, 13/13 perspectives dormant
findings.recommended_fix: activate learning loop and weight updates; validate spawn counts are non-zero

findings.issue: leaderboards present in Life Simulator — violates Crystal Law 5 (Collaborative > Zero-Sum) and P0 in ecosystem-map.md
findings.recommended_fix: remove all user rankings, replace with shared Focus Rooms or collective milestones

whistleblower_flag: swarm operating in simulation without updated code-index — production risk imminent
